title: SKYLEO Desk Lamp - LED Desk Light - 5 Color Modes X 11 Brightness Levels - Adjustable Swing Arm - Timmer & Memory Function - 12W Study Lamp - White
features: Brightness：Set up a home office. SKYLEO LED desk lamp with 1300 lumens(112 Pcs Lamp Beads), different brightness(3000~6000K) , And CRI≥90

Size：All parts of the desk lamps for study can move and adjusted, swing arm stand up to a maximum working height of approx 80cm, even the light head(43cm in length)part can be rotated to avoid bright light straight to your eyes, wide range of motion

Install：The LED table lamp itself is easy to assemble and clamp, and can be fixed on the edge of the table with a simple installation.The gooseneck extend and rotate as needed. The light can be shone on the ceiling and used as a room light for sleeping

Operation Control：The usb desk lamp is easy to use,the button works perfect every time. The touch button to switch between brightness levels is very cool. Can link to any 5V/2A USB interface(Package does not include adapter)

Timer & Memory：When the timer function is touched, the blue indicator lights up and the lamp desk will automatically turn off after 45 minutes and remain at your last brightness setting the next time you turn it on. The USB cable is 180cm long for daily use
description: Product Description Previous page Perfect Brightness 3000K~6000K brightness adjustment to give you any brightness you want. Perfect Adjustment The adjustment for every angle to achieve the lighting angle you need to do your job efficiently. Perfect Eye Care Allows provide lighting while operating fine work, keep eyes from getting too tired from the light.
